title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
ordinary thunderstorms, some locally moderate, are expected for E CE.

---Risk Areas---

GNRL
Poland, Moravia, Slovakia, E Austria & Hungary

Thunderstorms are expected through out the day, as a low pressure system above Poland passes through, bringing unstable air with a cold front right behind it.
The main threat is:
- Extensive wind gusts - multiple thunderstorms can have wind gusts up to 60+km/h.
- Hail - up to 2cm possible
